welcome_offer.description: Earn 60,000 Membership Rewards® Points after you spend $6,000 on eligible purchases on your new Card within the first 6 months of Card Membership.

earning_rates.notes: Worldwide, on up to $50,000 in purchases per calendar year.
At U.S. supermarkets, on up to $25,000 in purchases per calendar year.
Booked directly with airlines or on AmexTravel.com.
On prepaid hotels booked through AmexTravel.com.

annual_credits.name: Uber Cash
annual_credits.description: $10 monthly for Uber rides or Uber Eats in the US.

annual_credits.name: Dunkin' Credit
annual_credits.description: $7 monthly credit at U.S. Dunkin' locations.

annual_credits.name: Resy Credit
annual_credits.description: $50 semi-annually for eligible purchases with Resy.

annual_credits.name: Dining Credit
annual_credits.description: $10 monthly at participating partners (Shake Shack, Cheesecake Factory, etc.).

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: $100 credit on eligible charges when booking 2+ nights via Amex Travel.
